description: Access Azure services and resources through MCP tools for cloud operations.
name: io.qent.broxy/azure

environmentVariables.description: Your Azure client ID for authentication
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Your Azure client secret for authentication
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: HTTP proxy URL for outbound requests (optional)
environmentVariables.name: HTTP_PROXY

environmentVariables.description: HTTPS proxy URL for outbound requests (optional)
environmentVariables.name: HTTPS_PROXY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of hosts to exclude from proxying (optional)
environmentVariables.name: NO_PROXY

title: Azure
